name: PBT — Pushback Training
description: Training simulator for veterinary teams. Practice handling client pushback (cost, breeder advice, raw food, prescription diets, brand switches) against AI customer roleplay grounded in WSAVA / Royal Canin guidance. Sessions are scored on 7 dimensions (empathy, listening, knowledge, objection handling, confidence, closing, pacing) and tied to your ECHO personality driver (Activator / Energizer / Analyzer / Harmonizer).
